title: mellow moist irish beef wrap
description: a funky and show-off irish dish featuring lean minced beef, caramelized and served in a pandan-leaf wrap, low-glycemic-friendly. perfect for a weeknight dinner or a lunch on-the-go.
instructions: heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
add the onion, garlic, carrot, and celery, and cook until the vegetables are caramelized, about 10 minutes.
add the minced beef and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until it is no longer pink, about 5 minutes.
add the beef broth, ale, honey, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
meanwhile, prepare the pandan leaves by cutting them in half lengthwise and soaking them in cold water for 10 minutes.
remove the pandan leaves from the water and pat them dry with paper towels.
warm the pandan leaves in the microwave for 10-15 seconds to make them pliable.
place a scoop of the beef mixture onto the center of each pandan leaf, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
add some chopped fresh parsley on top, if desired.
fold the bottom edge of the pandan leaf up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up to form a tight cylinder.
serve the mellow moist irish beef wraps hot or at room temperature, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
if serving cold, refrigerate the wraps for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
